text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer <username>.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I figured you would be here as you<n>weren't in
your room.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Have you made your first shrine visit<n>for the new
year? If not, would you<n>like to join me?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I know it's a little late for a first visit,<n>but it's far
better than not going at all.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It's a trainer's job to pray for the<n>safety of their
racers.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I must do everything I can to avoid<n>having
regrets later.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Like when you wish you'd<n>done something
differently or that<n>something had turned out
another<n>way.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I want to prevent any regrettable<n>things from
happening, as much as<n>possible—both for the
sake of my<n>racers and for myself.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: It's a hard lesson I learned from my<n>past.
choice_data_list: You must have learned something important.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but there is no end to learning.<n>We must
always strive to improve for<n>our students.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
To ensure that everyone who wishes<n>to race can
strive toward the future<n>they desire...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I won't make the same mistakes<n>again.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I see a strong resolve in her gaze as<n>she looks
high into the sky above.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: And that's why I must thank you.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Because I was able to learn so much<n>from the
honest approach you take<n>with your trainee.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Although I do think you venture out<n>too far at
times...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
As a fellow Tracen trainer, I'll be sure<n>to caution
you whenever you do go<n>overboard, all right?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Well, here's to a—

text_block_list.name: Man with Headband
text_block_list.text: Heeey, you two! Care to pound some<n>mochi?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Us?

text_block_list.name: Man with Headband
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you two! C'mon, you can eat<n>what you
make, and nothin' beats<n>freshly made mochi!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: B-but I... well...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Very well. I suppose it'snot often we get an opportunity likethis.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...I wonder if I can even lift the mallet.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Hrgh! Urk! Hnnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I help her as she shakily wields the<n>mallet, and
we have fun making some<n>mochi together.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling that our friendship will<n>only
continue to grow from here.
